title: Ellie's Enderite Mod
description: Ellie's Enderite Mod simply adds an endgame ore 'Enderite' into the game. Enderite is only found in the end, and is more powerful than Netherite.
body:
Ellie's Enderite Mod simply adds an endgame ore 'Enderite' into the game. Enderite is only found in the end, and is more powerful than Netherite.

Items Added:

Enderite Shard,
Enderite Ingot,
Enderite Ore,
Enderite Block,
Enderite Helmet,
Enderite Chestplate,
Enderite Leggings,
Enderite Boots,
Enderite Axe,
Enderite Pickaxe,
Enderite Sword,
Enderite Shovel,
Enderite Hoe

Enderite Ore is found in the outer end islands, spawning an average of one vein per chunk. Each ore drops an Enderite Shard, four shards creating an ingot, ingots used to create tools and armor just like any other resource.
